# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.

Write secure code.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: my-vpc-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true
    routingConfig:
      routingMode: REGIONAL

- name: my-vpc-firewall-allow-internal
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
      - 10.128.0.0/9
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
      - IPProtocol: udp
      - IPProtocol: icmp

- name: my-vpc-firewall-allow-external
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 1000
    sourceRanges:
      - 0.0.0.0/0
    allowed:
      - IPProtocol: tcp
        ports:
          - '80'
          - '443'
    targetTags:
      - web-tier

- name: my-vpc-firewall-deny-all
  type: compute.v1.firewall
  properties:
    network: $(ref.my-vpc-network.selfLink)
    direction: INGRESS
    priority: 65535
    denied:
      - IPProtocol: all
